title: Pathways from Contaminated E-Waste to Water-Related Diseases
description: A flowchart illustrating how improper e-waste management leads to water contamination, which in turn causes waterborne and water-induced diseases.
relationships: E-Waste leaches toxins into water sources
Contaminated water is used for drinking/washing
Contaminated water creates habitats for disease vectors
Direct ingestion of chemicals causes poisoning
Indirect contact leads to skin diseases
